phrases.intent_en: Ask if the Salle des Illustres is open for visits
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que la Salle des Illustres est ouverte aux visites aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh lah SAL day zee-LOOS-truh eh oo-VAIR oh vee-ZEET oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: The Capitole houses Toulouse's city hall and the Théâtre du Capitole; the grand painted Salle des Illustres is free to visit when not in official use.

responses.english: Yes, it is open until five o'clock.
responses.phonetic: wee say too-VAIR zhoos-kah dee-SET UR
responses.french: Oui, c'est ouvert jusqu'à dix-sept heures.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for an opera ticket for next Saturday
phrases.text_local: Je voudrais un billet pour l'opéra samedi prochain, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh voo-DRAY un bee-YAY poor loh-pay-RAH sam-DEE proh-SHAN seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Théâtre du Capitole is one of France's leading opera houses and the cultural centrepiece of Toulouse.

responses.english: At the Capitole Theatre ticket office.
responses.phonetic: oh gee-SHAY doo tay-AH-truh doo kah-pee-TOL
responses.french: Au guichet du Théâtre du Capitole.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Violette cross is on the square
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la croix de la Violette sur la place ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah KRWAH duh lah vyoh-LET soor lah PLASS
phrases.cultural_note: Embedded in the paving of Place du Capitole is the gold Occitan cross, a symbol of Toulouse and the local culture.

responses.english: It is in the centre of the square, on the ground.
responses.phonetic: say toh SAHN-truh duh lah PLAHSS oh SOL
responses.french: C'est au centre de la place, au sol.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the weekly market on the square takes place
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure se tient le marché hebdomadaire sur la place ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel ur suh TYAN luh mar-SHAY eb-doh-mah-DAIR soor lah PLASS
phrases.cultural_note: A Wednesday market and a Saturday organic market are held on Place du Capitole.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a good café with a view of the square
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous me conseiller un café avec vue sur la place ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY-voo muh kohn-say-YAY un kah-FAY ah-VEK VYU soor lah PLASS
phrases.cultural_note: The arcaded cafés surrounding Place du Capitole are perfect for people-watching over a café au lait.

responses.english: Try the café on the square, over there.
responses.phonetic: eh-say-YAY luh kah-FAY soor lah PLAHSS lah-BAH
responses.french: Essayez le café sur la place, là-bas.
